title: CFTC Commitments of Traders Row
description: Common base schema for a row of CFTC Commitments of Traders data returned by the SODA endpoints at publicreporting.cftc.gov. Specific report formats add additional category breakdowns.

market_and_exchange_names.description: Combined market and exchange name as published by the CFTC.

report_date_as_yyyy_mm_dd.description: Report Tuesday for the COT week.

cftc_contract_market_code.description: CFTC contract market code identifying the underlying contract.

open_interest_all.description: Total reportable plus non-reportable open interest in the contract.
